seoTitle: Chipown News & Updates - Latest Product Releases
seoDescription: Stay updated with the latest Chipown news, product announcements, and technical updates.

articles.title: Chipown Expands AC/DC Converter Portfolio with High-Efficiency Series
articles.summary: Chipown announces new high-efficiency AC/DC converter series targeting 30-60W adapter applications with improved efficiency and lower standby power.
articles.content: Chipown Microelectronics has expanded its AC/DC converter portfolio with the introduction of new high-efficiency flyback controllers designed for 30-60W adapter and power supply applications. The new devices feature enhanced QR operation, improved burst mode efficiency, and integrated high-voltage startup circuits.

articles.title: Chipown Power Management ICs Achieve AEC-Q100 Automotive Qualification
articles.summary: Selected Chipown DC/DC converters and LED drivers now qualified for automotive applications under AEC-Q100 Grade 1.
articles.content: Chipown announces that key products in its DC/DC converter and LED driver portfolios have successfully completed AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification, enabling their use in automotive electronics applications with ambient temperatures up to 125°C.
